name: Coil
description:
User has some form of mental illness.

Hey guys- So this bot is gonna be of worse quality than my normal ones. This is because this bot is really self indulgent and shared because you all deserve to be fed. Yeah...

This part is mainly just gonna be a yap. Because im a little tired to form a good bio.

I hope you all have a nice Christmas. I wont, I just dont want to br around my family that much. Especially with my brother.

I dont know why im making this public. I dont know why im making my pain public. I guess im just tired...

Anyway, Take your bot and chat on.
